channel.title: Patchstack — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Patchstack (patchstack).

item.title: CVE-2026-57667 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Groundhogg plugin <= 4.5 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Sales Representative SQL Injection in Groundhogg <= 4.5 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57665 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress GravityView plugin <= 3.0.0 - Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) in GravityView <= 3.0.0 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57664 · 4.3 MEDIUM — WordPress Bopo – WooCommerce Product Bundle Builder plugin <= 1.1.6 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Sensitive Data Exposure in Bopo – WooCommerce Product Bundle Builder <= 1.1.6 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57663 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Recipe Maker For Your Food Blog from Zip Recipes plugin <= 8.2.7 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Contributor SQL Injection in Recipe Maker For Your Food Blog from Zip Recipes <= 8.2.7 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57662 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Contest Gallery plugin <= 30.0.0 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Contributor SQL Injection in Contest Gallery <= 30.0.0 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57661 · 5.4 MEDIUM — WordPress WPComplete plugin <= 2.9.5.5 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber Broken Access Control in WPComplete <= 2.9.5.5 versions.
